rationale: The cited paper is used as a core prior study in the citing paper's problem framing, hypothesis development, and result interpretation, not just as background. The citing paper repeatedly positions Abell et al. (2024) as the key star-versus-numeric comparison, then argues that Abell did not establish veridicality and that its interpretation is incomplete. The citing paper also runs analyses that replicate Abell's pattern under one star-fill method and then show different results under another method, using this to qualify the earlier conclusions.
relation_description: The citing paper refines Abell et al. (2024) by separating relative format differences from absolute misestimation and by introducing star fill method as a critical boundary condition. It argues that both numeric underestimation and star overestimation contribute, so the earlier interpretation is narrower than originally implied.
